name: Unauthenticated visit to /app redirects to login
description: When a user visits /app (or any protected route) without an active session, the middleware/layout auth gate redirects them to /login before the app shell renders. This is a regression guard for the edge middleware fix (src/proxy.ts export rename) and confirms auth is enforced at the request boundary, not just the component level.

planSteps.description: Open a fresh browser session with no saved cookies or localStorage (incognito/fresh profile)
Navigate directly to /app on the target URL
Verify the browser is redirected to /login and the login page is visible with an email input, password input, and submit button — NOT the app dashboard or a blank page
